---
title: {{TITLE_YAML}}
format:
  docx:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
{{REFERENCE_DOC_OPTION}}
---

{{REPORT_BODY}}

## Reproducibility

This DOCX is rendered from the generated Quarto source `pk_fixture_report.qmd`.
The source ADPC-like input, descriptive CSV summaries, plot PNG files, and render
manifest are stored in the same report directory.

This report is for PK-like synthetic fixture review only. It is not a clinical
pharmacology validation report, VPC/GOF package, or submission-ready ADaM output.
